utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: OK , that is enough of the view . Check this out , look at this . Sit down , sit down .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: This is great ! Helen , could you come in here for a moment ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Thank you Helen , that will be all .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Last time I do that , I promise .
